title: Ethics Committees Animal Research Ethics Committee - Forms
content:
Ethics Committees Animal Research Ethics Committee - Forms

Animal Experiments Local Ethics Committee Application Form

Animal Experiments Local Ethics Committee Letter of Commitment

Application Procedure

The ethics committee application form, letter of commitment and order form are filled in by the project coordinator and sent to the ethics committee secretariat electronically by attaching a photocopy of the certificate of use of experimental animals.
